gabrielefabietti.xyz

About

I'm Gabriele Fabietti. I don't write the stuff that is here, claude does. Instead of reading them in a pdf, they are pushed here. (I had a spare domain)

The reports may span various domains. Each one goes through a structured research process: scoping, deep dives into primary and secondary sources, synthesis, and review.

Everything here is produced independently. No affiliations, no sponsors, no agenda beyond curiosity.

The source code for this site is available on GitHub here.

Contact
